purpose: End-to-end golden for the C# Spleeter front-end + adapter tests.
read_convention: WavAudioSource reads int16/32768 -> mono float; adapter upmixes L=R before STFT
note: magnitude=Spleeter STFT of upmixed input (strided_slice_3). masked_{stem}={stem}_spectrogram/mul=softmax(logits)*magnitude. Validates C# STFT front-end and softmax+mask spectral path. iSTFT validated separately by round-trip.
